license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beumjeu6
title: Optical Image Collection
author: Guanshi Zhang

steps_raw.instruction: Before the matrix application, right after defrosting in desiccator, the AF image (pre-AF) is captured on a confocal microscope. UTHSA: 10× objective on a Leica TSC SP8 PNNL: 20x objective on a Zeiss 710 LSM; 10x objective PALM MicroBeam (Zeiss inverse microscope Axiovert) 495 nm-720 nm, 404-488 nm and bright field channels are used for AF imaging with pinhole size 239 μm.
Matrix application and MALDI-MSI (duplicates for each sample at each spatial resolution).
AF image are uploaded to METASPACE and registered to corresponding MSI data.
Air dry slides (after storage at -80 °C ) for 00:03:00 to 00:05:00 under the hood.
Fix slides in ice cold acetone:methanol solution (1:1) for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00 at -20 °C
Wash/rehydrate slides in distilled H2O for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00
Stain slides with hematoxylin for 00:00:20 to 00:00:30 Mayers hematoxylin solution Contributed by users
Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00

Rinse slides with differentiating solution by moving slides up and down 3-4 times within 00:00:05 . Then check the intensity of nuclear stianing under the microscope. If signal is too week, then go back to step 8 and do staining again for 00:00:05 to 00:00:10 , then rinse slides with distilled water again for 00:00:01 to 00:00:02 . Mastertech Differentiating Solution Contributed by users Catalog #HXD00188E
Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00
Rinse slides with Bluing solution by moving slides up and down for 00:00:05 to 00:00:10 Mastertech Bluing Solution American Master Tech Scientific Catalog #HXB00288E
Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00
Stain slides with Eosin for 00:00:15 to 00:00:20 Eosin Solution Contributed by users
Wash/dehydrate slides with 75% ethanol for 00:01:00 to 00:02:00 75% Ethanol Contributed by users
Dehydrate slides with 95% ethanol for 00:01:00 to 00:02:00 95% Ethanol Thermo Scientific
Dehydrate slides with 100% ethanol for 00:02:00 (twice) 100% Ethanol Contributed by users
Immerse slides in xylene for 00:02:00 (twice) Xylene Contributed by users
Air dry slides under the hood for 00:03:00 to 00:05:00
Mount sections with Permount and cover with coverslips Coverslips Contributed by users Chemical Permount Mounting Medium Fisher Scientific Catalog #SP15-100
Stained amples are imaged using an Aperio ScanScope XT
H&E images are uploaded to METASPACE and registered to the corresponding MSI data
Slides are then re-stained with PAS
Place the slides in 10% formalin in 95% alcohol for 00:10:00 .
Oxidize in 0.5% periodic acid solution for 00:05:00 0.5% Periodic Acid Solution (0.5g periodic acid in 100mL DI water) Contributed by users
Rinse in tap water four times.
Place in Schiff reagent for 00:15:00 Schiff’s reagent Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3952016-500ML Sections become a light pink color
Wash in lukewarm tap water for 00:05:00 Sections immediatly become a dark pink color
Counterstain in Mayer's hematoxylin for 00:03:00 Mayers hematoxylin solution Contributed by users
Rinse in TBS solution and then rinse in deionized water four times.

Dehydrate by the successive ethanol and xylene steps 14 to 18 and coverslip using a synthetic mounting medium. 75% Ethanol Contributed by users 95% Ethanol Thermo Scientific 100% Ethanol Contributed by users Xylene Contributed by users Coverslips Contributed by users Chemical Permount Mounting Medium Fisher Scientific Catalog #SP15-100
PAS slides from same tissue section as the H&E slide is imaged using Aperio ScanScope XT and uploaded to METASPACE and registered to the corresponding data.
Rinse in tap water four times.
